item.title: NAVADMIN - NAVADMIN-304-23 - ANNOUNCING NEW YEARS DAY DECK LOG POEM CONTEST FOR 2024 CORRECTED COPY.summary

item.title: NAVADMIN 114/26 - NAVY RESERVE PROMOTIONS TO THE PERMANENT GRADES OF CAPTAIN, COMMANDER, LIEUTENANT COMMANDER, LIEUTENANT, AND CHIEF WARRANT OFFICER IN THE LINE AND STAFF CORPS
item.description: UNCLASSIFIED/ RTTUZYUW RUOIAAA0001 1341528-UUUU--RHSSSUU. ZNR UUUUU R 141528Z MAY 26 MID120041246678U FM CNO WASHINGTON DC

item.title: NAVADMIN 115/26 - NAVY WOUNDED WARRIOR ANNOUNCES THE TEAM NAVY ROSTER FOR 2026 WARRIOR GAMES
item.description:
# AI Summary
_AI-generated summary. Verify details against the full official message._
**Summary of NAVADMIN 115/26**
**Subject:** Team Navy Roster for the 2026 Warrior Games
- **Announcement Date:** May 26, 2026 - **Affected Individuals:** Selected Sailors and Coast Guardsmen (see roste roster below) - **Event Details:** The Warrior Games will take place in San Antonio, TX f from June 1 to June 8, 2026. The competition includes 12 adaptive sports. - **Roster Selections:** - GSM1 Blair, Christina - HMC Borrero, Cesar (ret) - GSM1 Bray, Kiiursti - MT2 Delgado, Benjamin - FCA2 Delmer, William - CAPT Fairchild, Gregory - SA Fleming-Jones, Aspen - LS2 Garcia, Christopher (ret) - CTR2 Girard, Briana (ret) - GM2 Gordillo Gomez, Jose - MK2 Hamilton III, William - MM3 Hatori, Tyler - MM1 Jew, Jasmine - CS1 Kilpatrick, Christina - LS1 Leon, Matthew - MMN1 Lerch, Lenna - AO1 Livingston, Dustin - HM2 Miller, Chelsea (ret) - HM3 Mutesi, Hanifah - RSSN Pennington, Ma'khai - OS1 Piotrowski, Derek - IT1 Raimondi, Francine - AO3 Rivera, Christina - AOAN Rodriguez Medina, Edmarie (ret) - GM1 Ruff, Hillary (ret) - PR1 Shoemaker, James (ret) - PS2 Solarin, Olutoyosi (ret) - YNCS Swibold, Gaylin - AM1 Trosper, Thomas - HM1 Walker, Demetrius (ret)
- **Program Information:** Navy Wounded Warrior coordinates personalized no non-medical care and offers opportunities for adaptive sports and reconditi reconditioning events. All travel expenses are covered by the program.
**For More Information:** Visit [navywoundedwarrior.com](https://www.navywoundedwarrior.com), call 85 855-628-9997, or email navywoundedwarrior.fct@navy.mil.
**Verify details against the full official message.**
